purpose: Agent prompt that derives ACs, splits stories, and authors pre-impl verification commitments; governed by JSON Schema contracts in plugins/base/schemas/

public_api.name: story-planner.md
public_api.signature: Markdown agent prompt consumed by base:story-planner skill
public_api.description: Normative rules for Modes 1, 2, 3 including AC precision rules, Validation Checks, and schema citations

public_api.name: stories.schema.json
public_api.description: Enforces structure of stories.json; story.id and story_order items MUST match ^S[0-9]+$

public_api.name: verification.schema.json
public_api.description: Enforces structure of verification.json question records; requires question_id, phase, category, question; ac_id MUST NOT be required

test_targets: AC-STRUCT-1: grep -n 'within the AC file' plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md returns empty
AC-STRUCT-4: grep -n 'not.*"type"' plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md returns >=1 after Mode 3 heading
AC-STRUCT-5: grep -n 'stories.schema.json' plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md returns >=1 after Validation Checks
AC-STRUCT-7: python3 -m json.tool plugins/base/schemas/verification.schema.json exits 0 and ac_id not in required
